flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 56% at Western Oklahoma State College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (774 vs 1.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Western Oklahoma State College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (64.2% → 55.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Western Oklahoma State College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.5k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Western Oklahoma State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).
